message:
Simplify README to focus on user needs

Remove implementation details and decorative sections that don't help
users understand the repository's purpose. Keep essential information
about what the repository does and its structure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,25 +1,10 @@
 # ✨ Tenzir News
 
-## 🌟 What's Inside
-
 This repository aggregates product updates and changelog entries from Tenzir
 repositories, presenting them in a unified view for easy tracking of new
 features, improvements, and fixes across the Tenzir ecosystem.
 
-### 📋 Content Sources
-
-Changelog entries are collected from:
-
-- 🔧 [tenzir/tenzir](https://github.com/tenzir/tenzir): Core platform
-- 📚 [tenzir/docs](https://github.com/tenzir/docs): Documentation updates
-
 ## 📁 Repository Structure
 
 This repository contains one directory per project, each following the
 [tenzir/changelog](https://github.com/tenzir/changelog) format.
-
-## 🔄 How It Works
-
-This repository receives changelog entries from other Tenzir repositories and
-consolidates them into a coherent timeline of changes, making it easy to stay
-informed about developments across the entire project.
